It's like finding a whole family of cosmic cousins for our planet!

title: Lunar Leap: Private Spacecraft Makes History
story: A new chapter in space exploration unfolded on February 22, 2024. Odysseus, a privately built spacecraft, touched down on the moon's surface. Odysseus proved that space isn't just for government agencies anymore!

title: Canine Cosmonauts Blast Off!
story: Woof! Two brave dogs named Veterok and Ugolek became the first canine duo to orbit Earth together. The Soviet Union launched these furry cosmonauts aboard Kosmos 110 in 1966.
